_note: M1 lift-gate sample fixture. Shape == the runtime return of lift_probe.workflow.js, i.e. what `lift_gate.py score` consumes. The baseline fails A1+A2 which are 'must' (hard-gating) -> its pass_rate is 0.0; the with-skill condition passes all 5. EXPECTED: pass_rate_with=1.0, pass_rate_without=0.0, lift=1.0 >= 0.2 -> decision 'register' (exit 0).
